features: ORIGINAL SOURCE: We capture the intensity nature has to offer. Original Source is made with 100% natural fragrances, we’re inspired by nature, from our bold scents and vibrant colours, we've made it our mission to share fruity sensorial hits in every shower
THE POWER OF NATURE: We've packed juicy upcylced peaches and 100% natural fragrance in every bottle of this sweet and fruity shower gel.
PARABEN FREE: Peach & Dragonfruit shower gel has been consciously made without parabens.

100% VEGAN & PETA APPROVED: Original Source is proudly vegan and we carry the logo on all our products. Our products are tested on us, never on animals. This unique fragrance is created to offer a shower experience to stimulate the senses with an intense hit of nature.
SHOWER GEL MUTLIPACK: Extend your daily dose of freshness and nature with this 6 x 250ml shower gel multipack.
description: Product Description A shower gel multipack with 6 bottles bursting with a unique and fresh fragrance! Experience a sweet and fruity freshness with our Juicy Original Source Peach and Dragon Fruit shower gel. We’ve used upcycled peaches in every bottle to deliver an uplifting fragrance that harness the very best nature has to offer, while reducing waste. Our products are tested on us, never on animals, paraben free and we’re proud to be Vegan too. Original Source Shower Gel is manufactured in the UK using 100% renewable electricity and our bottles are 100% recyclable. Enjoy your daily shower time with a sensorial hit of nature! Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Lactic Acid, Parfum, Glycol Distearate, Glyceryl Oleate, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Prunus Persica (Peach) Fruit Extract, Hylocereus Undatus (Dragon Fruit) Fruit Extract, Citric Acid, Potassium Sorbate, Glycerin, Limonene, Linalool, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, CI 14700, CI 15510. Safety Warning Be careful to avoid eyes, it's not for them it's for your body! See more
